mapper.select: SELECT warehouse_id, warehouse_code, warehouse_name, location, type, is_active FROM WAREHOUSE WHERE warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WAREHOUSE (warehouse_code, warehouse_name, location, type, is_active) VALUES (#{warehouseCode}, #{warehouseName}, #{location}, #{type}, 1)
mapper.update: UPDATE WAREHOUSE SET is_active = 0 WHERE warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}
